pageContext.name: Shudog "Cement"
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Superplastic are excited to present the Shudog 'Cement' Designer Collectible Toy!  Shudog 'Cement'- Inspired by the most iconic kicks in the game and tougher than coffin nails, forged by Lucifer's left hand. Shudog is 8 inches of crispy clean, never creased vinyl, and comes with a horrible attitude and a tag of authenticity.  Don't miss your chance to add this designer collectible to your collection today!
